projects.title: Enterprise Multi-Agent RAG Assistant
description: Built a production-style enterprise AI assistant using LangGraph and LangChain.
Implemented RAG pipelines with ChromaDB and FAISS.
Integrated semantic retrieval, memory management, and multi-agent orchestration.
Developed FastAPI backend and React frontend.
Implemented tool calling, state recovery, and hallucination filtering.

projects.title: LLM-Based Research Summarization Platform
description: Built an NLP platform for research summarization using transformer models.
Fine-tuned BERT and DistilBERT models using PyTorch.
Implemented semantic search and document chunking.
Designed scalable REST APIs for inference.

projects.title: AI Interview Evaluation System
description: Developed an AI-powered interview analysis platform.
Implemented vector retrieval and semantic candidate evaluation.
Integrated speech-to-text and LLM reasoning workflows.

experience.title: AI Engineer Intern
description: Developed RAG pipelines and AI agents.
Built semantic retrieval systems for enterprise search.

summary: AI Engineer focused on Generative AI systems, RAG architectures, semantic retrieval, and production-ready LLM applications.
